ideas.name: Personalized Marketing
ideas.desc: Enables customer segmentation, personalized campaign design, dynamic content personalization, and marketing performance analysis for retail and CPG brands. Segments by purchase behavior and LTV, designs targeted campaigns, and A/B tests content.

ideas.name: Inventory Visibility
ideas.desc: Delivers real-time inventory dashboards, stock-out alerts, replenishment planning, and channel allocation optimization for omni-channel retail and CPG operations. Tracks stock across stores, warehouses, and in-transit.

ideas.name: Returns & Complaints Resolution
ideas.desc: Automates return processing, classifies customer complaints, recommends optimal resolutions, and identifies complaint trends for retail and CPG customer service teams. Surfaces product quality issues for merchandising.

ideas.name: Store Associate Copilot
ideas.desc: Provides store associates with instant product lookup, guided customer assistance scripts, daily task checklists, and real-time performance dashboards to improve in-store operations.

ideas.name: Supply Chain Disruption Alert
ideas.desc: Monitors supply chain networks for disruption events, performs risk assessments, generates mitigation playbooks, and identifies qualified alternative suppliers to maintain retail continuity.
